advisories: train_tsdae() has noise_ratio parameter in signature but doesn't pass it to DenoisingAutoEncoderLoss constructor — library uses delete_ratio parameter instead
summary: All 14 checklist items verified. generate_training_data.py has variant generation (seed+10000), TF-IDF hard negatives from different categories, JSONL format. fine_tune.py has TSDAE+contrastive 2-stage pipeline. Config 4th model with revision:null. load_model() handles null revision. 22 new tests, beads issues closed.

advisories: Unused noise_ratio parameter in train_tsdae — declared but not wired to DenoisingAutoEncoderLoss (uses delete_ratio internally)
Double variant generation in main() — generate_variants() called in both generate_contrastive_pairs() and again explicitly, same seed produces identical results but redundant computation
summary: Clean ML pipeline code. No anti-patterns. Taxonomy-only training data with seed offset. Lazy imports for heavy deps. SentenceTransformerTrainer API (not deprecated fit()). load_model revision handling correct. 22 tests covering data loading, format validation, and mocked training.
